FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string representing the Git hash for flags.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance by quickly retrieving flag information.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string that updates with a timestamp for flipping flags.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players always have the most current flag settings.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Maintains a dynamic string for the Git hash of flag repositories.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Allows for real-time updates to flag information for players.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string for flipping flags with a timestamp.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Enhances speed in updating flag states for a smoother player experience.
